panels.raw_text: Ryan walks quickly toward a bus.
panels.expanded_prompt: Wide shot, full-body side view of a man mid-stride. A lean young man strides briskly along a city pavement, arms swinging, right leg forward, torso leaning into the motion, heading toward a stopped city bus visible on the right. He wears a navy blue commuter jacket, grey slim trousers, white sneakers, and an olive green backpack on his left shoulder; short dark hair, light stubble. Streetlamp, pavement lines, distant buildings. Bright outdoor morning daylight, soft urban tones. Clean storyboard-style digital illustration, soft ink outlines, flat-wash color fills, mild cel-shading.

panels.raw_text: Ryan pauses at the door and looks ahead.
panels.expanded_prompt: Medium-wide shot, low angle, full-body composition. A lean young man stands at the open door of a city bus, right foot raised onto the first step, left foot still on the pavement, right hand gripping the vertical entry rail, body angled upward, gaze fixed forward into the bus interior. He wears a navy blue commuter jacket, grey slim trousers, white sneakers, olive green backpack on his left shoulder; short dark hair, light stubble. Bus door frame, warm interior light spilling out from inside, street visible behind him. Clean storyboard-style digital illustration, soft ink outlines, flat-wash color fills, mild cel-shading.

panels.raw_text: Ryan gets inside and sits by the window.
panels.expanded_prompt: Medium shot from across the aisle, full upper body visible with part of the bus interior. A lean young man sits in a bus window seat, body angled toward the window, olive green backpack resting on his lap, both hands on the backpack, head turned to look out the window. He wears a navy blue commuter jacket and grey slim trousers; short dark hair, light stubble. Bus seat rows, overhead luggage rack, cityscape blurred through the window. Warm bus interior lighting with cool daylight through the glass. Clean storyboard-style digital illustration, soft ink outlines, flat-wash color fills, mild cel-shading.
